task: pick redbull can from middle drawer and place on counter
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A gray countertop holds a green can, a white bowl, and a white bottle. A drawer is open below, containing a silver can. The drawer is metallic with a black handle. The silver can is inside the drawer, partially obscured. **STRATEGY -** First, reach into the drawer to grasp the silver can. Then, transport it to the countertop and place it there. The task requires opening the drawer (implicitly, as it's already open), grasping the can, and placing it on the counter. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach into the drawer to grasp the can. The can is inside the drawer, so the affordance is the can's body. Step 2: Grasp the can. The can is metallic and cylindrical, so grasping its body is appropriate. Step 3: Transport the can to the countertop. The destination is the countertop, so the affordance is an empty area there. Step 4: Place the can on the countertop. The affordance is an empty area on the countertop.

Goal: on(silver_can, counter); stable(silver_can)
Scene: silver_can, counter, drawer, green_can, white_bowl, white_bottle
Step 1: reach(silver_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the silver can inside the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, silver_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, silver_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(silver_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the silver can
  contact: holding(silver_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_can)
Step 3: transport(silver_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter
  spatial: above(silver_can, counter, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(silver_can)
  done_when: above(silver_can, counter, 0.05)
Step 4: place(silver_can -> counter)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the counter
  contact: surface_contact(silver_can, counter) [completion]; released(silver_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(silver_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_can, counter) AND released(silver_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the silver can inside the drawer
the body of the silver can
an empty area on the counter
an empty area on the counter
